item.title: MIUI OS3.0.3.0.VMICNXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi Civi 3 China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi Civi 3 China

Codename: yuechu

Version: OS3.0.3.0.VMICNXM | 15.0

Size: 8.9 GB

MD5: 635903ef1df9c6df7e8851829fb340b8

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to February 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
